entries.sourceValue:
Augeo Clean Multi stands out as a sustainable, high-performance base for aromatic reed diffusers and interior sprays, offering excellent solubility, a low-odor profile, and a balanced evaporation rate that enhances fragrance longevity without metallic notes. This biodegradable, non-toxic solvent, with a reduced carbon footprint compared to traditional glycol ethers, seamlessly blends environmental responsibility with superior scent diffusion, making it a trusted choice for artisans seeking quality, eco-conscious home fragrance solutions.

  • Exceptional solubility power, providing seamless blending with a wide range of fragrance oils.
  • Optimal evaporation rate, ensuring a balanced and prolonged fragrance release in reed diffusers and room sprays.
  • Low odor profile, enhancing the purity of the scent without interference from the solvent itself.
  • Non-toxic and biodegradable, prioritizing safety for both users and the environment.
  • High compatibility with various formulations, acting as an effective coupling agent for diverse fragrance applications.
  • Low vapor pressure (LVP-VOC) classification, supporting eco-friendly compliance while maintaining performance.
entries.existingValue: Augeo Clean Multi destaca-se como uma base sustentável e de elevado desempenho para difusores de varetas e sprays de ambiente, oferecendo excelente solubilidade, baixo odor e uma taxa de evaporação equilibrada que prolonga a durabilidade da fragrância sem notas metálicas. Este solvente biodegradável e não tóxico, com uma pegada de carbono reduzida em comparação com éteres glicólicos tradicionais, combina responsabilidade ambiental com uma difusão superior do aroma, tornando-se uma escolha fiável para artesãos que procuram soluções de perfumaria para a casa de qualidade e ambientalmente conscientes.

Made from 100% pure, unbleached cotton, braided wicks are designed for clean, steady burning and excellent capillary action. Flat, tightly woven, and carefully treated, these wicks are optimized for use with vegetable waxes such as soy, rapeseed, olive, coconut, stearin, palm, and their blends. Certified according to OEKO-TEX® Standard 100 (Class I/II) and compliant with strict European REACH and RAL-GZ 041 standards, they offer both safety and reliability for professional candle makers.

At AROMA + WAX, we carry three practical sizes of wicks to suit different candle diameters, giving you the flexibility to match wick performance with your chosen container or wax blend. Whether you’re pouring soy jar candles, experimenting with rapeseed blends, or crafting seasonal collections, these wicks provide the stability and consistency you need for candles that burn beautifully from start to finish.

entries.sourceValue:
This kit is designed for anyone who wants to make a first real batch of container candles and understand how small-scale candle production works in practice. A batch of 25 candles is enough to move beyond a single test pour and experience the workflow of a real production run — from preparing materials and measuring fragrance to pouring consistently and evaluating the finished batch as a whole.

Whether you want to launch your own candle brand, test a business idea, or simply learn the process properly from the start, this kit gives you a realistic and motivating foundation. It helps you understand timing, workflow, material behaviour, and what it actually takes to produce a polished first batch for sale.

What’s inside the kit?

  • 5 kg Golden Wax 464. Our number one choice for candle production. This premium 100% natural soy wax helps you create smooth, beautiful candles with excellent scent throw and reliable performance.
  • 25 x 200 ml amber glass candle jars with golden aluminium lids. One of the most popular candle formats for first collections, test runs, and small production batches. The set comes with golden lids as standard, but you can choose another colour — black, silver, white, or bronze — by mentioning it in the order note at checkout.
  • 25 candle wicks. Ideal for candles of this size.
  • 5 x 120 g fragrance oils. Suitable for container, pilar candles and wax melts. We selected some of our most trendy and in-demand fragrances to give you a strong starting point: Sicilian Neroli & Cashmere, Black Pepper & Velvet Orchid, Wild Strawberry Cream & Silk, Green Cardamom & Eucalyptus, and Vanilla & Patchouli. You can also create your own set of any five fragrances from our collection — just write their names in the order note at checkout.
  • Thermometer. Essential for measuring wax temperature correctly and working with more confidence.
  • Step-by-step candle making instructions. Clear guidance to help you pour your first 25-candle batch with confidence. Follow them carefully, and you can create an excellent first production run that looks professional, smells beautiful, and gives you a real understanding of how a candle business begins in practice.
entries.existingValue: Este kit foi criado para quem quer produzir um primeiro lote real de velas em recipiente e compreender, na prática, como funciona a produção de velas em pequena escala. Um lote de 25 velas é suficiente para ir além de um simples teste e experimentar o fluxo de uma produção real - desde a preparação dos materiais e medição da fragrância até ao vertimento consistente e à avaliação do lote final como um todo. Quer queira lançar a sua própria marca de velas, testar uma ideia de negócio ou simplesmente aprender o processo corretamente desde o início, este kit oferece uma base realista e motivadora. Ajuda-o a compreender tempos, fluxo de trabalho, comportamento dos materiais e o que é realmente necessário para produzir um primeiro lote cuidado e pronto para venda.

entries.sourceValue: Fiber diffuser reeds are premium, eco-friendly alternatives designed to enhance the performance of reed diffusers with superior capillary action and durability. Crafted from synthetic fibers, these reeds feature a porous, multi-channel structure that efficiently draws up fragrance oil and disperses it into the air through evaporation. Fiber reeds offer a larger surface area and consistent porosity, ensuring a stronger, more even scent throw while minimizing clogging from thick oils. Available in three different colors, they are ideal for use with Augeo solvent, providing a sustainable, long-lasting option that can be flipped every 1–2 weeks to refresh the fragrance release.
entries.existingValue: As varetas de fibra para difusor são alternativas premium e ambientalmente responsáveis, desenvolvidas para melhorar o desempenho dos difusores de varetas através de uma ação capilar superior e maior durabilidade. Produzidas a partir de fibras sintéticas, apresentam uma estrutura porosa multicanal que absorve eficientemente o óleo de fragrância e o dispersa no ar por evaporação. As varetas de fibra oferecem uma superfície maior e porosidade consistente, assegurando uma difusão do aroma mais forte e uniforme, ao mesmo tempo que reduzem o entupimento causado por óleos mais densos. Disponíveis em três cores diferentes, são ideais para utilização com solvente Augeo, oferecendo uma opção sustentável e duradoura que pode ser virada a cada 1-2 semanas para renovar a libertação da fragrância.

entries.sourceValue:
This kit is made for anyone who wants to take a serious first step into making candles and reed diffusers. It includes everything needed to create a small test batch, work with real professional materials, and understand how home fragrance production looks in practice.

Whether you want to launch your own brand, test a business idea, or simply learn the process properly, this kit gives you a realistic and motivating start. It lets you experiment with fragrance, work with wax and diffuser base, and see how a small home fragrance line comes together.

What’s inside the kit?

  • 1 kg Golden Wax 464. Our number one choice for candle production. This premium 100% natural soy wax delivers smooth, beautiful candles with excellent scent throw and reliable performance.
  • 5 x 200 ml amber glass candle jars with aluminium lids. The most popular candle size for testing and small batches. The set includes five different lids so you can see how the final look of your candles can change.
  • 25 candle wicks. Ideal for candles of this size.
  • 5 x 120 g fragrance oils. Suitable for both candles and reed diffusers. We selected some of the most trendy and in-demand fragrances to give you a strong starting point: Sicilian Neroli & Cashmere, Black Pepper and Velvet Orchid, Wild Strawberry Cream & Silk, Green Cardamom & Eucalyptus, Vanilla & Patchouli. You can also choose your own set of any five fragrances from our collection — just write their names in the order note at checkout.
  • 5 glass diffuser bottles with screw neck, 125 ml. A practical and elegant format for your first reed diffusers.
  • 50 rattan reeds
  • 500 g Augeo diffuser base. A professional-quality base for reed diffusers.
  • Thermometer. Essential for measuring wax temperature correctly.
  • Step-by-step instructions for candle and diffuser making. Clear guidance to help you produce your first batch with confidence. Follow them carefully, and you can make an excellent first batch of home fragrance products that looks professional, smells beautiful, and helps you understand the real potential of this business.
entries.existingValue: Este kit foi criado para quem quer dar um primeiro passo sério no fabrico de velas e difusores de varetas. Inclui tudo o que é necessário para criar um pequeno lote de teste, trabalhar com materiais profissionais reais e compreender como é a produção de perfumaria para a casa na prática. Quer queira lançar a sua própria marca, testar uma ideia de negócio ou simplesmente aprender o processo corretamente, este kit oferece um início realista e motivador. Permite experimentar fragrâncias, trabalhar com cera e base para difusor, e perceber como uma pequena linha de perfumaria para a casa ganha forma.

Além de acrescentarem um toque de design moderno ou uma estética mais rústica aos seus produtos, estas tampas para velas também funcionam como uma solução prática para preservar a qualidade e o aroma das velas. entries.sourceValue:
This sample collection is perfect for those who are new to exploring how fragrances unfold in candles, diffusers, and other products. We have selected bright, consistent aromas that will help smooth out the bumps of your first creative experiments. The collection is an ideal choice for candle-making, and room and pillow sprays, bar and liquid soaps and some fragrances are also suitable for creating diffusers. Ten bottles, 10 grams each.

  1. Pure Jasmine
  2. Spiced Apple & Cinnamon
  3. Sage & Sea Salt
  4. Tobacco & Vanilla
  5. By the Fireplace
  6. Palo Santo de Marabi
  7. Opium & Musk
  8. Luscious Lime & Basil
  9. Black Pepper & Velvet Orchid
  10. Vanilla Cream
entries.existingValue: Esta coleção de amostras é perfeita para quem está a começar a explorar como as fragrâncias se desenvolvem em velas, difusores e outros produtos. Selecionámos aromas luminosos e consistentes que ajudam a tornar mais fáceis as primeiras experiências criativas. A coleção é uma escolha ideal para fabrico de velas, sprays de ambiente e de almofada, sabonetes sólidos e líquidos, e algumas fragrâncias também são adequadas para criar difusores. Dez frascos de 10 g cada. Jasmim puro, maçã especiada e canela, sálvia e sal marinho, tabaco e baunilha, junto à lareira, Palo Santo de Marabi, ópio e almíscar, lima suculenta e manjericão, pimenta-preta e orquídea aveludada e creme de baunilha.

entries.sourceValue: Rattan diffuser reeds are the classic choice for natural, elegant fragrance diffusion. Made from sustainably harvested rattan, each stick contains a network of tiny capillaries that draw fragrance oil upward and release it gradually into the air through evaporation. Their lightweight, porous structure allows for a subtle, steady scent throw, creating a gentle and welcoming atmosphere. Unlike fiber reeds, rattan has a slightly less uniform appearance, which highlights its organic character and artisanal charm. Available in a natural finish, these reeds are perfect for pairing with Augeo-based diffuser solutions and work best when flipped every few days to refresh the fragrance release. A timeless option for diffuser making, they combine simplicity, sustainability, and a warm, authentic aesthetic.
entries.existingValue: As varetas de rattan para difusor são a escolha clássica para uma difusão natural e elegante da fragrância. Produzida a partir de rattan colhido de forma sustentável, cada vareta contém uma rede de pequenos capilares que puxam o óleo de fragrância para cima e o libertam gradualmente no ar por evaporação. A estrutura leve e porosa permite uma difusão subtil e constante do aroma, criando uma atmosfera suave e acolhedora. Ao contrário das varetas de fibra, o rattan tem uma aparência ligeiramente menos uniforme, que evidencia o seu carácter orgânico e charme artesanal. Disponíveis em acabamento natural, estas varetas combinam perfeitamente com soluções para difusor à base de Augeo e funcionam melhor quando viradas a cada poucos dias para renovar a libertação da fragrância. Uma opção intemporal para fabrico de difusores, que combina simplicidade, sustentabilidade e uma estética quente e autêntica.

Polysorbate 20 is a mild, non-ionic solubilizer and emulsifier derived from sorbitol and natural fatty acids. It is widely used to disperse fragrance oils or essential oils in water-based formulations without the need for alcohol.

For home fragrance makers, Polysorbate 20 is a reliable way to create clear, stable sprays where fragrance blends smoothly with water. In room sprays it helps prevent separation and cloudiness, resulting in a clean, professional-looking product.

It is ideal for water-based room sprays, body mists and fabric sprays made with distilled water.

Polysorbate 20 is also widely used in cosmetic and personal care formulations such as shampoos, conditioners, liquid soaps, bath products, scrubs and lotions. By improving the dispersion of oils in water, it helps achieve a smooth, stable texture and a more even fragrance distribution in the final product.

Highlights

• Cosmetic-grade quality
• Biodegradable and safe for use in cosmetics and home fragrance products
• Approved for use in cosmetic, food and pharmaceutical applications by the FDA and EFSA

Room Spray Formula with Polysorbate 20

  • 2–5% fragrance oils
  • ~1% Polysorbate 20
  • remainder distilled water

First blend the Polysorbate 20 with the fragrance oils, then slowly add the distilled water while stirring thoroughly until the mixture becomes clear and uniform.
entries.existingValue: Polysorbate 20 é um solubilizante e emulsionante suave, não iónico, derivado do sorbitol e de ácidos gordos naturais. É amplamente utilizado para dispersar fragrâncias ou óleos essenciais em formulações de base aquosa, sem necessidade de álcool. Para criadores de perfumaria para a casa, Polysorbate 20 é uma forma fiável de criar sprays límpidos e estáveis, nos quais a fragrância se mistura suavemente com a água. Em sprays de ambiente, ajuda a evitar separação e turvação, resultando num produto limpo e com aspeto profissional.

Tefacid® Stearic Acid is a professional-grade stearic acid developed by AAK, one of the world’s leading suppliers of specialty lipids for the candle industry. Considered an industry benchmark, Tefacid® is valued for its exceptional consistency, purity, and predictable behavior in production. Its carefully controlled fatty acid composition ensures stable results across batches, making it a trusted choice for manufacturers who demand reliability, repeatability, and high visual standards in finished candles.

In candle making, Tefacid® stearic acid is used to improve both the aesthetics and performance of wax formulations. It increases hardness and opacity, enhances surface finish, and supports clean, effortless mold release — key factors for producing sharp, well-defined pillar and molded candles. By raising the melting point and reinforcing candle structure, Tefacid® helps achieve longer-lasting, more durable products with a professional appearance. It integrates easily into paraffin and blended wax systems, giving candle makers precise control over texture, stability, and final presentation.

  • Reduced set-up time
  • Great mold release
  • Allowed for vibrant colors
  • Creates a fragrance throw comparable to paraffin
  • Compatible with standard candle-making equipment
  • Easily modified and combined with other waxes
  • Versatile and adaptable, for easily customizable blends

entries.sourceValue: This oil-soluble Black Liquid Dye is crafted with a sustainable, natural solvent for effortless blending in vegetable wax and paraffin at just 0.1% usage. It creates a variety of hues, from pale to deep black, depending on the type of wax and the amount of dye applied. When used with soy wax, it typically achieves light to medium tones, while paraffin wax allows for a broader range, spanning from greyish shades to intense hues. We recommend trying out different combinations to find your perfect colour.
entries.existingValue: Este corante líquido Vibrant preto, solúvel em óleo, é produzido com um solvente natural e sustentável, permitindo uma mistura fácil em cera vegetal e parafina com apenas 0,1% de utilização. Cria uma variedade de tonalidades, de tons claros a preto profundo, dependendo do tipo de cera e da quantidade de corante aplicada. Em cera de soja, normalmente alcança tons claros a médios, enquanto a parafina permite uma gama mais ampla, desde tonalidades acinzentadas até cores intensas. Recomendamos testar diferentes combinações para encontrar a cor perfeita.

entries.sourceValue: This one-of-a-kind fragrance captures the sharp freshness of a misty forest clearing, where fern fronds release their crisp, green tang into the air, cutting through with an invigorating, herbaceous zest. The scent is anchored by the earthy, slightly bitter essence of moss, weaving a vivid and grounding aroma that evokes the exhilarating stillness of dew-drenched foliage after the rain. Our absolute favourite!
entries.existingValue: Esta fragrância única capta a frescura incisiva de uma clareira de floresta enevoada, onde as folhas de feto libertam no ar a sua faceta verde, nítida e vibrante, atravessada por uma energia herbal revigorante. O aroma é ancorado pela essência terrosa e ligeiramente amarga do musgo, criando uma fragrância vívida e enraizada que evoca a quietude estimulante da folhagem coberta de orvalho depois da chuva. Uma das nossas favoritas absolutas.

The Winter Fragrance Oils Kit unites the most captivating winter scents — comforting, luxurious, gourmand and full of festive warmth. From cozy notes that evoke winter evenings by the fire to elegant blends perfect for timeless creations, this set captures what people love most about the colder months. Rich, balanced, and beautifully versatile, it’s a celebration of winter’s most inviting aromas. Twelve bottles, 10 grams each.

  1. Winter Pines & Velvet Petals 
  2. By The Fireplace
  3. Rose & Champagne

  5. Very Gingerbread

entries.existingValue: Kit de fragrâncias de inverno reúne os aromas de inverno mais cativantes - reconfortantes, luxuosos, gourmand e cheios de calor festivo. Desde notas acolhedoras que evocam noites de inverno junto ao fogo até misturas elegantes perfeitas para criações intemporais, este conjunto capta aquilo que mais se aprecia nos meses frios. Rico, equilibrado e lindamente versátil, é uma celebração dos aromas mais convidativos do inverno. Dez frascos de 10 g cada. Pinheiros de inverno e pétalas aveludadas, junto à lareira, rosa e champanhe, tabaco e baunilha, pão de gengibre intenso, madeira de caxemira e fava-tonka, âmbar doce e fumo, lareira de Natal, baunilha e patchouli e moscatel e figo.

Stabilo Cotton Wicks – the ultimate choice for a clean, consistent burn. Also known as CD wicks, these flat-braided cotton wicks are expertly designed with special paper filaments to deliver a steady flame and minimal soot or mushrooming. 

Why Stabilo Cotton Wicks?
  • Versatile performance: Perfect for container candles.
  • Excellent scent throw: Handles high fragrance loads effortlessly. 
  • Works with various waxes: Ideal for soy, rapeseed, olive, beeswax, and coconut wax, as well as blends like paraffin-soy. 
  • Clean burning: Designed to reduce soot and ensure a flawless burn.

Pre-tabbed and coated with a premium natural wax blend, these wicks are easy to work with and come in various sizes to suit different candle diameters. To choose the right wicks for your candles, use our wick selection guide.
